steps.t: Pieces of faded parchment can be found in Sarnúr, south of Thorin's Hall, reached through the ruins of Orodost. Rútur has asked you to recover any pie…
Rútur is in Thorin's Hall, north of Sarnúr, just outside the Blue Stone Garrison. Now that you possess the pieces of faded parchment that Rútur reques…
